---
name: Issue Template
about: Report a bug or request a feature for PromptForge AI
labels: triage
---

## Issue Type

- [ ] Bug Report
- [ ] Feature Request
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Question

---

## Bug Report

*If this is a feature request, delete this section.*

### Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

### Steps to Reproduce

1. Open PromptForge AI
2. ...
3. ...
4. See error

### Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

### Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

### Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| OS | Windows 11 / macOS 14 / Ubuntu 24.04 |
| PromptForge Version | 0.1.0 |
| Node.js Version | 20.x |
| Electron Version | 30.x |
| AI Provider | Ollama / Groq / OpenAI / etc. |
| AI Model | llama3.1 / llama-3.1-70b / etc. |

### Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or error logs.

<details>
<summary>Error Log</summary>

```
Paste error logs here
```

</details>

### Severity

- [ ] Critical — App crashes or data loss
- [ ] High — Feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] Medium — Feature broken, workaround exists
- [ ] Low — Minor issue, cosmetic

---

## Feature Request

*If this is a bug report, delete this section.*

### Problem

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the limitation you've encountered.

### Proposed Solution

Describe your ideal solution. How should it work?

### Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

### Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples.

### Priority Suggestion

- [ ] P0 — Essential for core workflow
- [ ] P1 — Important improvement
- [ ] P2 — Nice to have

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I'm using the latest version of PromptForge AI
- [ ] I included all relevant environment information
